infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Reads Apple Health data to supplement Garmin and Withings metrics in your personal health dashboard.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Health Dashboard does not write to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used to scan barcodes for food logging.

plugins.healthSharePermission: Reads Apple Health data including steps, sleep, heart rate, and HRV to power your personal health dashboard.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: Health Dashboard does not write to Apple Health.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Health Jarvis to use your camera to scan food barcodes.
